titleStmt.title: SII 20.285: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 285. (B.K. No. 118 of 1938-39.) AḌŪR, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab standing near the Kaḷamēśvara temple.

summary.p: This damaged record is dated Śaka 989, Plavaṅga, Pushya, ba, 1. Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1067, December 23, Sunday, f.d.t. 54. The saṁkrānti occurred on the next day.

The inscription records a gift of 300 plam-trees for the benefit of the temple of Kāḷēśvara, by gāvuṇḍa Āytavarmayya and others. The gift was made over to Bāḻachandrapaṇḍita of Śakti-parshe. It refers to [Poṭṭi]yūru and Pāṇḍi[yūru].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatpa svasti sama
dhigatapaṁcamahāśabda svara vīra mahēsvara śau
ryyakaṇṭhīrava bhṛtya cintāmaṇi śaucāṁjanē
ya bhuvanābhirāmaṁ sāhasō sannāha
pakṣapāti ḷa sāma baḷajaḷadhi baḍavānaḷa cōḷa
1. The record is broken after this.

kaṭaka nubhayabaḷa cāryanēkāṁgavīra sanivāra
siddhi śrīmaṁpāhācadēvi mādisamastaprasasti
rasar pānuṁgalla
poṭṭi yūru pāṇḍi
sukhadināḷuttamire . ©
mahāśabdamahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ banavāsi
purādhī prasādōtpatti triḷōcanaka
daṁbānvaya mayūravarmmavaṁsōdbhavasa nityōdaya saucāṁja
nēya mādisamastaprasasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahā
ma sasti sa ṇa saṁpanna vibudhaprasanna
ma para nijagōtrabhāvaṁ dharmmā
rtthō rjjitaṁ catu ṇa vairinārāyaṇa dāna
vinōdanādityadēvalabdhavarapra mādi samastaprasastisa
hitaṁ śrīmatgāvuṇḍāytavarmmayyanuṁ . Intinibarumiṟdu saka
varṣa 989 neya plavaṁga saṁvatsarada puṣya ba 1 Ādityavā
ra Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrāntiyandu kāḷēśvaradēvara khaṇḍasphuṭita jī
rṇnōddhārakkaṁ dēvara dīpa nivēdyakkaṁ tapōdhanarasanācchādanakkaṁ
svasti yamaniyama svādhyāya dhyānadhāraṇa mōnānuṣṭhā
ṇa japasamādhisaṁpannarappa śrī śakti parāṣeya bāḻacandrapaṇḍiRead parṣaya.
tara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi perggeṟeya keḷage pannava
ṇadōṭadiṁ mūḍal biṭṭa Aḍakeya maraṁ mūnūṟu Intī
dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidargge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētraṁ prayāgeyoḷ
puṇyatīrtthadoḷsāsira kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnadoḷkaṭṭi
si sāsirvvarvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇarggubhayamukhigoṭṭa
phaḷamakku Ī dharmmamanaḷidanituṁ kavileyuma
bar brāhmaṇarumanā puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḻumanaḷida paṁcamahāpāta
kanakkuṁ . © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundhanāṁ ṣaRead rāṁ.
sahaśrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . ©
Digital edition of SII 20.285 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
